translated: If you do not know the answer, but, when the answer is revealed to you, you accept it, then you do not know it well. But if you know the answer before your friend, then you have understanding.

ref: And anyone who gives you a cup of water in my name, just because you belong to me, will surely be rewarded. Temptations To Sin (Matthew
text: M suse am nahɔrɛ wɔ lɛɛ, ka sɔnɔ kɛrɛ bo i maari am nzue ka am nu dama am su mini dɛɛ ti, i mi nyá i ŋkatɔ.” Kabo wɔ yo daka ka má sɔnɔ wura satiɛ nu ni
translated: I will tell you a story, so listen carefully to what I am about to say to you so that you may understand what I want to tell you, and you will know the truth." But they said that they do not want to hear it at all
